labels.name: applyCouponBlockedExclusiveErrorMessage
labels.value: This coupon can't be applied to your cart.

labels.name: defaultErrorMessage
labels.value: An unexpected error occurred. Try again later.

labels.name: applyCouponEffectiveAccountNotFoundErrorMessage
labels.value: Looks like you don't have access to this cart. Try another account.

labels.name: applyCouponInsufficientAccessErrorMessage
labels.value: Looks like you don't have permission to apply coupons to this cart. The store admin can help with that.

labels.name: applyCouponMaxLimitExceededErrorMessage
labels.value: You reached the coupon limit for this cart.

labels.name: applyCouponMaxItemLimitExceededErrorMessage
labels.value: Your cart has too many items for promotions to apply. To apply promotions, remove some items from your cart and re-enter any coupon codes.

labels.name: applyCouponUnqualifiedCartErrorMessage
labels.value: Your cart isn't eligible for coupon {code}.

labels.name: webstoreNotFoundErrorMessage
labels.value: You don't have access to this store.
